HomePage.title: PixelRing Reparatur
HomePage.description: Start your repair request in under a minute. Upload a photo or send a message. We bring your signage back to life — efficiently and without hassle.
HomePage.trust_badge: Real service company, not a contractor marketplace

Trust.description: We don't view technology as a tool, but as a craft. Our processes are designed for maximum transparency and technical perfection.

turnaround.label: STANDARD TURNAROUND
turnaround.description: Most repairs are completed within one business day.

warranty.label: MONTHS WARRANTY
warranty.description: We stand by our work. Full coverage on all installed parts.

hardware.label: ORIGINAL HARDWARE
hardware.description: No compromises. We only use certified components.

rating.label: CUSTOMER RATING
rating.description: Over 15,000 satisfied customers trust our expertise.

Intake.title: Choose your way
Intake.description: Start your request in the way that is most convenient for you. Our AI helps with fast capture.

steps.title: Submit Request
steps.description: Our AI captures your text, photos, or voice message instantly.

steps.title: Clarify Details
steps.description: A dedicated project manager reviews and refines the scope of work.

steps.title: Expert Assignment
steps.description: We match your task with the best qualified expert from our network.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: The work is performed on schedule at the highest technical standards.

steps.title: Warranty
steps.description: You receive a full technical guarantee on all services rendered.

Excellence.title: Visible Excellence
Excellence.subtitle: Our completed projects speak for themselves. Precision in every detail.

items.title: LED Mounting
items.description: Professional installation of large signage on facades.

items.title: Neon Repair
items.description: Precise restoration of classic neon tubes.

items.title: High-Rise Maintenance
items.description: Service at dizzying heights with state-of-the-art equipment.

steps.title: Confirmation
steps.description: Instant acknowledgement of your request via AI.

steps.title: Assignment
steps.description: A dedicated manager is assigned to you within 15 minutes.

steps.title: Technical Audit
steps.description: Audit of the task and final cost calculation.

steps.title: Execution
steps.description: On-time implementation by our experts on site.

items.question: How fast do you respond?
items.answer: After approval, we are usually on-site within 24 to 48 hours.

items.question: What is the warranty period?
items.answer: We provide a 6 to 12-month warranty on all labor and replacement parts.

items.question: Do you work with private clients?
items.answer: Yes, we serve both commercial businesses and private individuals with the same level of care.

items.question: What areas do you cover?
items.answer: We have a nationwide network of experts and can handle requests across the entire country.

ContactModal.title: Get in Touch
ContactModal.subtitle: Choose your preferred communication channel or leave a request.
ContactModal.success_message: We'll get back to you within 15 minutes.

FooterCTA.title: Still have questions? Contact us.
FooterCTA.subtitle: We are available via your preferred channel for a free initial assessment.
